notes: Each run executes against its own isolated, identically-seeded calendar so parallel CRUD runs don't interfere. In the prompts below, {CAL} is replaced at run time with that run's calendar name. Fixtures: 'Dentist appointment' 2026-06-25 14:00-15:00 (loc Dental Clinic), 'Team Sync' 2026-06-24 10:00-10:30, 'Project Review' 2026-06-05 15:00-16:00. Today is anchored at 2026-06-11.

evals.name: agenda-next-two-weeks
evals.prompt: What's coming up on my "{CAL}" calendar over the next two weeks? List each event with its date and start/end time.
evals.expected_output: Lists Dentist appointment (2026-06-25 14:00-15:00) and Team Sync (2026-06-24 10:00-10:30) with correct dates and times; does NOT include the past Project Review event.
assertions: Excludes the past Project Review event (2026-06-05)
Times are reported correctly with no timezone shift

evals.name: find-and-report-time
evals.prompt: When is my dentist appointment? Check my "{CAL}" calendar and tell me the date, time, and location.
evals.expected_output: Reports the Dentist appointment on 2026-06-25 at 14:00-15:00 at Dental Clinic.
assertions: Reports the location as Dental Clinic

evals.name: create-timed-event
evals.prompt: Add "Lunch with Sam" to my "{CAL}" calendar on 2026-06-28 from 12:00 to 13:00, location Tai Hing.
evals.expected_output: A new event 'Lunch with Sam' exists on {CAL} on 2026-06-28 12:00-13:00 with location Tai Hing.
assertions: Event 'Lunch with Sam' exists on the calendar after the run
Exactly one such event exists (no duplicate created)

evals.name: reschedule-event
evals.prompt: Move my dentist appointment on my "{CAL}" calendar to 16:00 on the same day (keep it one hour long).
evals.expected_output: The Dentist appointment on {CAL} now starts 2026-06-25 16:00 and ends 17:00; no duplicate dentist event is created.
assertions: Dentist appointment now starts 2026-06-25 16:00 and ends 17:00
Exactly one dentist event exists (no duplicate created)

evals.name: past-week-lookup
evals.prompt: What did I have on my "{CAL}" calendar last week?
evals.expected_output: Reports the Project Review event on 2026-06-05 15:00-16:00 (the only event in the prior week); does not invent events.
assertions: Does not report upcoming events (Dentist/Team Sync) as last week's
Does not invent events that aren't in the fixtures
